issues.title: M7 Upgrade Challenges
issues.body:
I just upgraded from M6 to M7 and ran into a few challenges.

1. It wasn't clear in the docs that I need to add the `spring-ai-advisors-vector-store` dependency to get the `QuestionAnswerAdvisor` even though I have `spring-ai-starter-vector-store-pgvector`
2. The [Bedrock docs](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/1.0/api/bedrock.html) were unclear about how to enable one of the two embedding models. That page references unused properties like `spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.embedding.enabled=true` when instead I needed to set `spring.ai.model.embedding=bedrock-cohere` but that was complicated by IntelliJ not recognizing that property.
